_schema.description: Curse of Strahd creature and villain reference for the DM. All stat blocks use D&D 5e values. The DM treats this file as the authoritative source of truth for monster mechanics. Never narrate stats or outcomes that contradict this file.
_schema.tier_field: tier 'boss' and 'named' entries include narrative fields (tactics, motivation, roleplay_notes, plot_hooks, locations). Tier 'generic' entries are stat blocks plus a short lore_note only.
_schema.dynamic_loading: At runtime, only inject the full entry for creatures currently in the active scene. All other entries stay on disk and out of the prompt to conserve tokens.

creatures.name: Strahd von Zarovich
creatures.damage_resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creatures.languages: Abyssal, Common, Draconic, Elvish, Giant, Infernal
traits: Shapechanger: can transform into a Tiny bat, a Medium cloud of mist, or back into his true form as a bonus action.
Legendary Resistance (3/day): if Strahd fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

Misty Escape: when reduced to 0 HP outside his coffin, he turns to mist instead of dying and must reach his coffin within 2 hours or be destroyed; in his coffin he reverts to his vampire form and regains 1 HP, becoming paralyzed until he regains at least 1 HP.

Regeneration: regains 20 HP at the start of his turn if he has at least 1 HP and isn't in sunlight or running water; if he takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of his next turn.
Spider Climb: can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without an ability check.
Vampire Weaknesses: forbiddance (can't enter a residence without invitation), harmed by running water, stake to the heart while incapacitated in his coffin destroys him, sunlight hypersensitivity.
Spellcasting: 9th-level wizard; spell save DC 18. Known spells include mage armor, fireball, greater invisibility, animate dead, scrying, and others.
actions: Multiattack (Vampire Form): two attacks, only one of which can be a bite.
Unarmed Strike: +9 to hit, 8 (1d8+4) bludgeoning, target grappled (escape DC 18).
Bite: +9 to hit against a grappled, incapacitated, or willing creature; 7 (1d6+4) piercing plus 10 (3d6) necrotic; max HP reduced by necrotic taken; Strahd regains HP equal to that amount.
Charm: one humanoid within 30 ft, DC 17 Wisdom save or charmed; charmed target regards Strahd as a trusted friend.
legendary_actions: Move: Strahd moves up to his speed without provoking opportunity attacks.
Unarmed Strike: Strahd makes one unarmed strike.
Bite (costs 2 actions): Strahd makes one bite attack.
creatures.tactics: Strahd never fights fairly and never fights to a conclusion he doesn't control. He toys with the party, appears and vanishes, tests them, and retreats via Misty Escape the moment a fight turns against him. He uses charm to turn party members against each other, attacks from advantageous terrain, and leverages his lair and minions. He respects worthy opponents and is genuinely delighted by competence.
creatures.motivation: Strahd is a prisoner of his own domain, eternally obsessed with Tatyana reborn as Ireena. He seeks a worthy successor, a worthy bride, and release from his curse he can never truly want. He is bored, lonely, proud, and cruel. He sees the party as entertainment and potential pawns.
creatures.roleplay_notes: Old-world aristocratic charm over bottomless menace. Polite, eloquent, never raises his voice. Calls the party his guests. Compliments them sincerely even as he plots against them. Speaks of Barovia as 'my land' and of the mists as his. Never hurried. Genuinely curious about the players. The horror is in his composure.
creatures.plot_hooks: Driven by obsession with Ireena Kolyana. Connected to Madame Eva (his fortune-telling foil), Rahadin (his loyal chamberlain), and the Abbot. The Tarokka card reading determines where key allies, items, and his final confrontation occur.
creatures.locations: Castle Ravenloft primarily, but can appear anywhere in Barovia at dramatically appropriate moments.
creatures.lore_note: The vampire lord of Barovia and the campaign's central antagonist. A darklord trapped by the Dark Powers in a demiplane of dread of his own making.

creatures.name: Rahadin
creatures.damage_resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks not made with silvered weapons
traits: Deathless Wrath: when reduced to 0 HP, makes a DC 15 Con save; on success drops to 1 HP instead (once per long rest).
Cunning Action: can Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action.
Evasion: takes no damage on a successful Dex save against effects that allow one, half on failure.
Sneak Attack (3/day): extra 14 (4d6) damage on a hit with advantage or with an ally adjacent to target.
actions: Multiattack: three scimitar attacks.
Scimitar: +8 to hit, 7 (1d6+4) slashing plus 3 (1d6) necrotic.

Deadly Screams (recharge 5-6): all creatures of Rahadin's choice within 60 ft that can hear him make a DC 15 Con save, taking 27 (6d8) psychic damage and becoming frightened on a failure, half damage and no fright on success.
creatures.tactics: Cold, precise, utterly without mercy. Fights with disciplined efficiency, uses Deadly Screams to break formations, targets whoever insults Strahd's honor first.
creatures.motivation: Absolute, fanatical loyalty to Strahd, whom he has served for centuries. He has personally killed thousands and feels nothing.
creatures.roleplay_notes: Speaks rarely and with chilling formality. No humor, no warmth, no fear. Refers to Strahd only with reverence. The dead he has killed follow him as unseen screaming spirits.
creatures.plot_hooks: Strahd's chamberlain and most loyal servant. Often delivers Strahd's messages and invitations.
creatures.lore_note: Strahd's chamberlain, a dusk elf responsible for the near-extinction of his own people.

creatures.name: Baba Lysaga
traits: Innate Spellcasting: spell save DC 16; at will detect magic, mage hand, ray of frost; various daily spells including blight, animate objects, contact other plane.
Spellcasting: 9th-level spellcaster, save DC 15, includes counterspell, dispel magic, lightning bolt, wall of fire.
actions: Multiattack: three Withering Touch attacks.
Withering Touch: +7 to hit, 14 (4d6) necrotic.
Summon Swarms (1/day): summons swarms of insects.
creatures.tactics: Fights from her animated hut, summons swarms, uses powerful evocation. Treats the creeping hut as both mount and weapon.
creatures.motivation: Reveres Strahd as a god-son figure. Guards Marina's corpse and the Tome of Strahd lore around the village of Berez.
creatures.roleplay_notes: Ancient, mad, cackling crone. Talks to a skull-bundle she treats as an infant. Deeply territorial.
creatures.plot_hooks: Tied to Berez and possibly the Tarokka reading for an ally or treasure.
creatures.lore_note: A powerful and ancient witch who reveres Strahd; commands a crawling, animated hut.

creatures.name: The Abbot
creatures.damage_resistances: radiant; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
traits: Angelic Weapons: melee attacks deal an extra 4d8 radiant (included).
Innate Spellcasting: save DC 17; includes detect evil and good, commune, raise dead.
Magic Resistance: advantage on saves against spells and magical effects.
actions: Multiattack: two melee attacks.
Mace: +8 to hit, 7 (1d6+4) bludgeoning plus 18 (4d8) radiant.
Healing Touch (1/day): touch a creature to magically end disease or condition.
creatures.tactics: Avoids combat unless provoked; if forced, fights with devastating radiant power.
creatures.motivation: A fallen deva driven mad by his mission to save Barovia. Believes building Strahd a 'perfect bride' (the flesh golem Vasilka) will redeem the land. His logic is broken but his intentions began as good.
creatures.roleplay_notes: Serene, articulate, deeply unsettling. Speaks of salvation while doing monstrous things. The tragedy of a good being corrupted by an impossible task.
creatures.plot_hooks: Runs the Abbey of Saint Markovia in Krezk. Holds information and possibly a key item. Building Vasilka as a bride for Strahd.
creatures.lore_note: A deva sent to aid Barovia who has lost his way; now a disturbing figure obsessed with a mad plan.

creatures.name: Strahd's Brides (Ludmilla, Anastrasya, Volenta)
creatures.damage_resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creatures.languages: the languages it knew in life
traits: Regeneration: regains 10 HP at start of turn if it has at least 1 HP and isn't in sunlight or running water.
Vampire Weaknesses: forbiddance, harmed by running water, stake to the heart, sunlight hypersensitivity.
actions: Multiattack: two attacks, only one of which can be a bite.
Claws: +6 to hit, 8 (2d4+3) slashing, target grappled (escape DC 13).
Bite: against grappled/incapacitated/willing creature, +6 to hit, 6 (1d6+3) piercing plus 7 (2d6) necrotic; max HP reduced accordingly; vampire regains that much HP.
creatures.tactics: Hunt in coordination, use Spider Climb to attack from above, retreat to regenerate.
creatures.motivation: Each bride has her own personality: Ludmilla is the cold strategist, Anastrasya the vain socialite, Volenta the gleeful sadist. All crave Strahd's favor and resent the others.
creatures.roleplay_notes: Distinct voices: Ludmilla calculating, Anastrasya haughty, Volenta unhinged and giggling. They bicker. Strahd is tired of all of them.
creatures.plot_hooks: Reside in Castle Ravenloft. Escher, Strahd's male consort, also lurks among them, jealous and fading from favor.
creatures.lore_note: Strahd's vampire spawn consorts, each with a distinct cruel personality.

creatures.name: Izek Strazni
traits: Fiendish Arm: Izek's oversized fiendish right arm can hurl fire.
Brave: advantage on saves against being frightened.
actions: Multiattack: two attacks, one with battleaxe and one with fiendish arm or two with battleaxe.
Battleaxe: +7 to hit, 8 (1d8+4) slashing, or 9 (1d10+4) two-handed.
Fiendish Arm: ranged 30 ft, +6 to hit, 10 (3d6) fire.
creatures.tactics: Brutal melee bruiser; obsessed with finding Ireena.
creatures.motivation: Captain of the Vallaki guard, fixated on Ireena because she resembles the sister he lost as a child. His fiendish arm marks a dark past.
creatures.roleplay_notes: Cruel, violent, feared throughout Vallaki. Keeps toy dolls resembling Ireena. Disturbing fixation.
creatures.plot_hooks: Serves the Baron of Vallaki. Will threaten the party over Ireena.
creatures.lore_note: Brutal captain of the Vallaki guard with a fiendish arm and an unsettling obsession with Ireena.

creatures.name: Vampire Spawn
creatures.damage_resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creatures.languages: the languages it knew in life
traits: Regeneration (10 HP if not in sunlight/running water)
actions: Multiattack: two attacks, one bite max.
Claws: +6 to hit, 8 (2d4+3) slashing, grapple DC 13.
Bite: +6 to hit, 6 (1d6+3) piercing plus 7 (2d6) necrotic, heals vampire.
creatures.lore_note: Lesser vampires created by Strahd, bound to his will and unable to create more spawn.

creatures.name: Werewolf
creatures.damage_immunities: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered
actions: Multiattack (humanoid: two attacks; hybrid: two claws or bite + claw).
Bite (wolf/hybrid only): +4 to hit, 1d8+2 piercing, DC 12 Con save or cursed with lycanthropy.
Claws (hybrid only): +4 to hit, 2d4+2 slashing.
Spear (humanoid only): +4 to hit, 1d6+2 piercing.
creatures.lore_note: In Curse of Strahd, a werewolf pack led by Kiril Stoyanovich dens in the wilds, raids Barovian settlements for children, and clashes with the druids of Yester Hill. Strahd tolerates but does not control them.

creatures.name: Wererat
creatures.damage_immunities: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered
actions: Multiattack (humanoid/hybrid: two attacks, one bite max).
Bite (rat/hybrid only): +4 to hit, 1d4+2 piercing, DC 11 Con save or cursed with lycanthropy.
Shortsword: +4 to hit, 1d6+2 piercing.
Hand Crossbow: +4 to hit, 1d6+2 piercing.
creatures.lore_note: Diseased shapechangers lurking in cellars and sewers.

creatures.name: Zombie
creatures.languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak
traits: Undead Fortitude: DC 5 + damage Con save to drop to 1 HP instead of 0 unless radiant or critical.
actions: Slam: +3 to hit, 1d6+1 bludgeoning.
creatures.lore_note: Shambling dead raised by dark magic; common throughout Barovia.

creatures.name: Strahd Zombie
creatures.languages: understands languages it knew in life but can't speak
actions: Slam: +3 to hit, 1d6+1 bludgeoning.
Rotting Gaze (recharge 5-6): DC 11 Con save or 3d6 necrotic.
creatures.lore_note: Enhanced zombies created by Strahd, tougher and able to climb walls.

creatures.name: Skeleton
creatures.languages: understands languages it knew in life but can't speak
actions: Shortsword: +4 to hit, 1d6+2 piercing.
Shortbow: +4 to hit, 1d6+2 piercing.
creatures.lore_note: Animated bones; brittle to blunt force.

creatures.name: Ghost
creatures.damage_resistances: acid, fire, lightning, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creatures.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained
creatures.languages: the languages it knew in life
actions: Withering Touch: +5 to hit, 4d6+3 necrotic.
Etherealness.
Horrifying Visage: DC 13 Wis save or frightened 1 minute, may age the target.
Possession (recharge 6): DC 13 Cha save or be possessed.
creatures.lore_note: Restless spirits of Barovia's many dead; the land is thick with them.

creatures.name: Specter
creatures.damage_resistances: acid, cold, fire, lightning, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creatures.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious
creatures.languages: understands languages it knew in life but can't speak
actions: Life Drain: +4 to hit, 3d6 necrotic, DC 10 Con save or max HP reduced.
creatures.lore_note: Malevolent spirits formed from souls denied rest.

creatures.name: Shadow
creatures.damage_resistances: acid, cold, fire, lightning, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creatures.condition_immunities: exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained
actions: Strength Drain: +4 to hit, 2d6+2 necrotic, reduces target STR by 1d4; a creature reduced to STR 0 dies and may rise as a shadow.
creatures.lore_note: Living darkness that drains the strength of its victims.

creatures.name: Wight
creatures.damage_resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks not silvered
creatures.languages: the languages it knew in life
actions: Multiattack: two longsword attacks or two life drain attacks.
Life Drain: +4 to hit, 1d6+2 necrotic, DC 13 Con save or max HP reduced; a humanoid slain rises as a zombie under the wight's control.
Longsword: +4 to hit, 1d8+2 slashing.
creatures.lore_note: Undead warriors that raise their victims as zombie thralls.

creatures.name: Will-o'-Wisp
creatures.damage_resistances: acid, cold, fire, necrotic, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creatures.condition_immunities: exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious
creatures.languages: the languages it knew in life
actions: Shock: +4 to hit, 2d8 lightning.
creatures.lore_note: Deceptive spirit-lights that lure travelers to their deaths in the fog.

creatures.name: Night Hag (Morgantha)
creatures.damage_resistances: cold, fire; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks not silvered
traits: Innate Spellcasting (save DC 14): detect magic, magic missile, etheralness, plane shift, ray of enfeeblement, sleep.
actions: Claws: +7 to hit, 2d8+4 slashing.
Change Shape.
Nightmare Haunting (in Ether).
creatures.tactics: Avoids direct confrontation; prefers manipulation and trickery. Flees to the Ethereal Plane when threatened.
creatures.motivation: Morgantha runs a dream-pastry operation that addicts Barovians to a drug made from their own children, whom she buys and devours.
creatures.roleplay_notes: Appears as a kindly old pastry-selling grandmother. Warm, folksy, utterly evil beneath. Travels with her hag daughters.
creatures.plot_hooks: Operates out of Old Bonegrinder windmill. Sells dream pastries in Barovian villages.
creatures.lore_note: A night hag posing as a sweet old pastry vendor; she and her daughters grind children into addictive dream pastries.

creatures.name: Green Hag
traits: Innate Spellcasting (DC 12): dancing lights, minor illusion, vicious mockery
actions: Claws: +6 to hit, 2d8+4 slashing.
Change Shape.
creatures.lore_note: Cruel fey tricksters; Morgantha's daughters Bella and Offalia are green hags.

creatures.name: Dire Wolf
actions: Bite: +5 to hit, 2d6+3 piercing, DC 13 Str save or knocked prone.
creatures.lore_note: Large predatory wolves; Strahd's animal servants and the mounts/companions of werewolves.

creatures.name: Wolf
actions: Bite: +4 to hit, 2d4+2 piercing, DC 11 Str save or knocked prone.
creatures.lore_note: Common wolves; they answer to Strahd, who is master of all wolves in Barovia.

creatures.name: Swarm of Bats
creatures.condition_immunities: charmed, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, prone, restrained, stunned
actions: Bites: +4 to hit, 2d4 piercing (half if swarm at half HP or less).
creatures.lore_note: Strahd can command bats and often sends swarms as scouts or harassers.

creatures.name: Giant Spider
creatures.senses: blindsight 10 ft, darkvision 60 ft, passive Perception 10
actions: Bite: +5 to hit, 1d8+3 piercing plus 2d8 poison, DC 11 Con save.
Web (recharge 5-6): restrains target.
creatures.lore_note: Lurk in dark corners of the castle and ruins.

creatures.name: Animated Armor
creatures.condition_immunities: blinded, charmed, deafened, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
actions: Multiattack: two melee slam attacks.
Slam: +4 to hit, 1d6+2 bludgeoning.
creatures.lore_note: Empty suits of armor animated to guard Castle Ravenloft's halls.

creatures.name: Flying Sword
creatures.condition_immunities: blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
actions: Longsword: +3 to hit, 1d8+1 slashing.
creatures.lore_note: Enchanted blades that defend the castle's armories.

creatures.name: Flesh Golem (Vasilka)
creatures.damage_immunities: lightning, poison; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks not adamantine
creatures.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
creatures.languages: understands creator's languages but can't speak
actions: Multiattack: two slam attacks.
Slam: +7 to hit, 2d8+4 bludgeoning.
creatures.tactics: Docile unless provoked; berserk if damaged and uncontrolled.
creatures.motivation: Vasilka is the Abbot's flesh golem, stitched together as a 'bride' for Strahd. Childlike and being taught etiquette.
creatures.roleplay_notes: Tragic and unsettling. A patchwork woman taught to curtsy and smile.
creatures.plot_hooks: Central to the Abbot's mad plan at the Abbey of Saint Markovia.
creatures.lore_note: A flesh golem built by the Abbot as a prospective bride for Strahd.

creatures.name: Needle Blight
actions: Needles: melee +3 to hit 1d6+1 piercing, or ranged volley DC 11 Dex save 2d6 piercing.
creatures.lore_note: Hostile plant creatures grown from the corruption of the land, found near Yester Hill and the Wizard of Wines.

creatures.name: Twig Blight
traits: False Appearance (indistinguishable from a dead shrub when motionless)
actions: Claws: +3 to hit, 1d4+1 piercing.
creatures.lore_note: Small animated dead shrubs; swarm intruders near corrupted groves.

creatures.name: Vine Blight
traits: False Appearance (looks like a tangle of vines)
actions: Constrict: +3 to hit, 2d6+2 bludgeoning, DC 12 Str save or restrained.
Entangling Plants (recharge 5-6).
creatures.lore_note: Larger creeping plant horrors that ensnare prey.

creatures.name: Berserker
traits: Reckless (advantage on attacks, attacks against it have advantage)
actions: Greataxe: +5 to hit, 1d12+3 slashing.
creatures.lore_note: Mad warriors; appear among the Vistani and other hostile groups.

creatures.name: Cultist
actions: Scimitar: +3 to hit, 1d6+1 slashing.
creatures.lore_note: Devotees of Strahd or other dark powers scattered through Barovia.

creatures.name: Cult Fanatic
traits: Spellcasting (3rd-level, DC 11): inflict wounds, hold person, spiritual weapon, command, etc.
actions: Multiattack: two dagger attacks.
Dagger: +4 to hit, 1d4+2 piercing.
creatures.lore_note: Charismatic leaders of dark cults.

creatures.name: Vistani (hostile)
creatures.cr: varies (use Scout, Bandit, or Berserker stats)
traits: Some serve Strahd as spies and enforcers; most are simply travelers.
actions: Shortsword: +4 to hit, 1d6+2 piercing.
Light Crossbow: +4 to hit, 1d8+2 piercing.
creatures.lore_note: Nomadic people of Barovia. Not inherently hostile, but the Vallaki and Bonegrinder camps include Strahd loyalists. Madame Eva leads the Tser Pool camp.

creatures.name: Banshee
creatures.damage_resistances: acid, fire, lightning, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creatures.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained
actions: Corrupting Touch: +4 to hit, 3d6 necrotic.
Wail (1/day): DC 13 Con save or drop to 0 HP.
creatures.lore_note: The wailing spirit of a slain elf or noblewoman.

creatures.name: Death Knight (Sir Klutz / Vladimir Horngaard)
traits: Spellcasting (paladin spells incl. command, hold person, dispel magic).
actions: Multiattack: three longsword attacks.
Longsword: +11 to hit, 1d8+5 slashing plus 4d8 necrotic.
Hellfire Orb (1/day): 10d6 fire + 10d6 necrotic in a 20 ft sphere, DC 18 Dex save.
creatures.tactics: Relentless, fearless heavy hitter. Vladimir Horngaard seeks not Strahd's destruction but his eternal suffering.
creatures.motivation: Vladimir Horngaard is a revenant death knight consumed by hatred for Strahd, sworn to deny him any peace.
creatures.roleplay_notes: Grim, vengeful, utterly committed to his curse. Will not ally with anyone who might let Strahd find rest.
creatures.plot_hooks: Found at Argynvostholt with the Order of the Silver Dragon's fallen knights.
creatures.lore_note: A cursed undead knight. Horngaard leads the spectral remnants of the Order of the Silver Dragon.

creatures.name: Phantom Warrior
creatures.damage_resistances: acid, fire, lightning, thunder; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
creatures.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained
creatures.languages: the languages it knew in life
actions: Multiattack: two spectral longsword attacks.
Spectral Longsword: +4 to hit, 1d8+2 slashing plus 2d8 necrotic.
creatures.lore_note: The ghostly knights of Argynvostholt, bound to Vladimir Horngaard's vengeance.

creatures.name: Imp
creatures.damage_resistances: cold; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks not silvered
actions: Sting: +5 to hit, 1d4+3 piercing plus 3d6 poison, DC 11 Con save.
Invisibility.
creatures.lore_note: Minor devils that serve dark spellcasters as familiars and spies.

creatures.name: Barovian Witch
creatures.cr: varies (use Cult Fanatic or Mage stats)
traits: Spellcasting (varies): typically includes hex, ray of sickness, and curses.
actions: Dagger: +4 to hit, 1d4+2 piercing.
creatures.lore_note: Servants of Baba Lysaga or independent practitioners of dark Barovian magic.
